headline: Three Glasgow 'deeptech' companies complete £772,000 investment round
summary: Quantcore received £250k from STAC Invest as part of a £772k round covering three Glasgow deeptech companies that completed STAC's 18-month accelerator. Note: Quantcore also separately raised £2.5m in seed funding in February 2026 (see duckduckgo-scottish-vc.json); the STAC £250k appears to be a separate tranche or earlier element of the wider round.
raw_snippet: Three Glasgow 'deeptech' companies spanning quantum computing, housing management and offshore wind infrastructure have completed a £772,000 investment round. STAC aims to become UK's most active deeptech investor, making more than ten investments a year.

headline: Three Glasgow 'deeptech' companies complete £772,000 investment round
summary: Vuabl, a Glasgow proptech startup using smartphone LIDAR sensors to create 3D property models and assess energy performance, raised £222k from STAC Invest. The company is running a pilot with Glasgow's Wheatley Group covering 65,000 homes. Funding will support further pilots and expansion to housing providers facing new regulatory obligations.
raw_snippet: Three Glasgow 'deeptech' companies spanning quantum computing, housing management and offshore wind infrastructure have completed a £772,000 investment round. Vuabl uses the LIDAR sensors found in modern phones to create 3D models, estimate energy performance and flag maintenance issues — tools intended to help landlords and social housing providers meet tightening regulatory requirements.

company_sector: Deep Tech / Offshore Wind Infrastructure / Inspection Technology
headline: Three Glasgow 'deeptech' companies complete £772,000 investment round
summary: Airspection, a Glasgow deeptech company focused on offshore wind infrastructure inspection, raised £300k from STAC Invest. The company completed STAC's 18-month accelerator programme and established its first headquarters at thebeyond, STAC's technology hub at Skypark in Glasgow.
raw_snippet: Three Glasgow 'deeptech' companies spanning quantum computing, housing management and offshore wind infrastructure have completed a £772,000 investment round. Airspection and Vuabl establishing their first HQ's at thebeyond, STAC's 22,000 sq ft technology hub at Skypark in Glasgow.
